default.heading: Audio Overlay
default.body: Pick a GIF, dub audio over it, and make everyone laugh!

default.heading: Pick a Category
default.body: One player chooses the vibe: animals, evil laughs, vehicles, and more!

default.heading: Choose a GIF
default.body: Browse the pool and pick a GIF that fits the category. Choose wisely!

default.heading: Record Your Dub
default.body: Your GIF gets swapped. Record audio over someone else's pick.

default.heading: Vote for the Best!
default.body: Watch all the dubs on the big screen, then vote for the funniest one!

randomized.heading: Audio Overlay
randomized.body: Pick a GIF, dub audio over it, and make everyone laugh!

randomized.heading: Pick a Category
randomized.body: One player chooses the vibe: animals, evil laughs, vehicles, and more!

randomized.heading: Choose a GIF
randomized.body: Browse the pool and pick a GIF that fits the category. Choose wisely!

randomized.heading: Swap and Dub
randomized.body: Your GIF gets reassigned. Record audio over the clip somebody else picked.

randomized.heading: Vote for the Best!
randomized.body: Watch all the dubs on the big screen, then vote for the funniest one!

record_own.heading: Audio Overlay
record_own.body: Pick a GIF, dub your own pick, and make everyone laugh!

record_own.heading: Pick a Category
record_own.body: One player chooses the vibe: animals, evil laughs, vehicles, and more!

record_own.heading: Choose a GIF
record_own.body: Browse the pool and pick a GIF that fits the category. This one stays yours.

record_own.heading: Record Your Dub
record_own.body: No swap this round. Record audio over the GIF you picked yourself.

record_own.heading: Vote for the Best!
record_own.body: Watch all the dubs on the big screen, then vote for the funniest one!
